overall.description: A video game scene (resembling GTA V) featuring a purple double-decker bus with colorful 'flash bass .FM' livery on a wet cobblestone street. The camera smoothly orbits around the front of the bus from the left side to the right side, revealing an urban environment with tree-lined streets, classical architecture, and parked cars under grey overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with parked bus and classical building facade

agents.ego_description: slowly circling around the stationary double-decker bus from the left side toward the front

entered.detail: purple double-decker bus with colorful FM radio livery and 'flash bass .FM' text
large building with columns visible through trees across the street
mature deciduous trees lining the sidewalk with green foliage
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the left side of a stationary purple double-decker bus on a wet cobblestone street. A classical building facade is visible through the trees in the background on the left, while the bus dominates the right side of the frame with its colorful graffiti-style livery.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street intersection with tree-lined road and parked vehicles

events.description: camera passes the front of the bus revealing the open street ahead with parked cars and tree line

agents.ego_description: continuing to circle past the bus windshield toward the right side, revealing the street ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked along the tree-lined curb

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including a white sedan along the opposite curb

segments.scene_description: As the camera rounds the front of the bus, the view opens to show the street ahead lined with parked cars and trees. The bus transitions from the right to the left side of the frame, revealing its front windshield and the driver inside, while the classical building disappears from view behind the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera orbit around a stationary purple double-decker bus, shifting the perspective from a narrow street view to an open urban vista. It begins by gliding along the left side of the vehicle on a wet cobblestone street, where a classical building facade is partially visible through a screen of trees. As the camera rounds the front of the bus, the colorful graffiti-style livery transitions from the right to the left side of the frame, momentarily revealing the driver behind the windshield. The scene then opens up to show the street ahead, lined with parked cars and trees under a grey sky, as the initial building disappears behind the camera's path.
